to be the taproot of smart agro. 
专注农业领域，推动从工厂到农场全产业链数字化转型。

Introduction: 
Taproot Agro
to be the taproot of smart agro. 
Focusing on the agricultural sector, it drives the digital transformation of the entire industry chain from factory to farm.

banners.alt: 病虫害预报/Pest and disease forecast
banners.title: 病虫害预报/Pest and disease forecast
banners.content:
演示/demo
taprootagro 病虫害预报
通过大数据，卫星图谱，为您实时跟踪当地的病虫害发生情况，帮您提前防治
橙色警告：当前附近有玉米螟虫危害，建议使用taprootagro-lambda进行防治。

Taprootagro Pest and Disease Forecast
Using big data and satellite imagery, we track local pest and disease occurrences in real time, helping you to prevent and control them in advance.
Orange Warning: Corn borer infestation is currently present nearby. We recommend using taprootagro-lambda for control.

articles.title: 北极星项目/Project Polaris
articles.author: 农业专家
articles.content:
演示/demo

北极星项目

重塑农化企业数字化连接

深度绑定"企业-门店-农户"全链路，构建数字化渠道关系。将业务数据转化为精准授信模型与核心数字资产，助力企业构建品牌护城河。


Project Polaris

Reshaping Agro-Chemical Enterprise Digital Connectivity

Deeply binding the entire "Enterprise – Store – Farmer" chain to build digital channel relationships. Transforming business data into precision credit models and core digital assets, empowering enterprises to build a lasting brand moat.

Taprootagro Gift Pack - Herbicide, Insecticide, Fungicide, Biostimulant, Fertilizer. One gift pack to protect your health all year round;

articles.title: taprootagro加纳开业10周年纪念/taprootagro Ghana 10th Anniversary
articles.author: 土壤专家
articles.content:
演示/demo
十年前，我们走出国门，前往西非加纳，在那里开启我司非洲市场to C拓展。
从tema港口一间平房开始，历经十年发展，我们成为当地领先的农化供应商。
十年间，我们坚持品质标准，面对复杂的非洲“非标”环境，从不对市场妥协，坚持使用标准含量产品，在当地形成良好口碑，为中国品牌出海，树立了良好形象。

xxxx

Ten years ago, we ventured abroad to Ghana in West Africa, launching our B2C expansion in the African market.

Starting from a small house in the port of Tema, we have grown into a leading agrochemical supplier in the region over the past decade.

Throughout these ten years, we have adhered to high quality standards. Facing the complex and often non-standardized environment of Africa, we have never compromised on market demands, consistently using products with standardized content. This has earned us a strong reputation locally and established a positive image for Chinese brands going global.

xxxx

articles.title: 尼日利亚奋斗/nigerian struggle
articles.author: 种植达人
articles.content:
演示/demo
尼日利亚是西非最大的农化单一市场，要布局非洲，这里是避不开的战略支撑点；
面对复杂的当地环境，团队成员不顾危险，坚守岗位，深入市场一线，深刻践行持续奋斗公司价值观。短短两年时间，就成为当地领先的农业公司

Nigeria is the largest single market for agrochemicals in West Africa, making it an indispensable strategic foothold for any expansion in Africa. Faced with a complex local environment, team members disregarded danger, remained steadfast in their posts, and immersed themselves in the front lines of the market, deeply embodying the company's values ​​of continuous striving. In just two years, they have become a leading agricultural company in the region.

articles.title: 巴西大豆解决方案/Brazilian soy solution
articles.author: 设施农业专家
articles.content:
演示/demo
巴西市场登记困难，成本高，流程长。历来是传统跨国公司自留地。我司不畏困难，勇往直前。不惜代价在当地登记登记证。为巴西农民带去更多，更好用的产品。
Registration in Brazil is difficult, costly, and lengthy, traditionally a domain reserved for multinational corporations. Our company, undeterred by these challenges, forged ahead, sparing no expense to obtain local registration certificates. This will bring more and better products to Brazilian farmers.

articles.title: taprootagro新产品/taprootagro new products
articles.author: 灌专家
articles.content:
演示/demo
红蜘蛛抗药性，是长期困扰农业生产的大麻烦。使用taprootagro  xxx和xxx混合方案，进行鸡尾酒治疗。可有效控制红蜘蛛泛滥次数。

Spider mite resistance is a long-standing problem plaguing agricultural production. Using a combination of Taprootagro xxx and xxx for a "cocktail" treatment can effectively control spider mite infestations.
